name: Counter Kitchen and Pass-Through Window
description: The narrow kitchen area behind the lunch counter, accessible only through the pass-through window and a staff door at the counter's far end — where Patsy Howell retreats when the pressure on the floor becomes unmanageable.
atmosphericDetails: The hot-fat smell of the grill dominant here — close, almost nauseating after the cold outside air
The sound of the coffee urns cycling — a mechanical, indifferent sound that continues regardless of what is happening at the counter
Patsy's hands on the dish rack — she is cleaning cups that are already clean
